reference: Hi, I am twenty weeks pregnant and have been having really bad back pain for about a week now. I also have a lot of pain in my right lower abdomen, and it sometimes stops me from moving. It hurts if I touch the area, and when I do touch it, it also hurts in my back and I experience shooting pain in my back passage and vagina.
text: Hi, I am twenty weeks pregnant and have been having really bad back pain for about a week now. I also have a lot of pain in my right lower abdomen, and it sometimes stops me from moving. It hurts if I touch the area, and when I do touch it, it also hurts in my back. And I experience shooting pain in my back passage and vagina.
